    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    D

    dailyLimitLabel - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Label displaying the calculated daily spending limit.
    DashboardScreen - Class in ui
    Main dashboard screen showing spending summary, daily limit gauge, and a category breakdown pie chart.
    DashboardScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.DashboardScreen
    Constructs the DashboardScreen.
    DatabaseHelper - Class in persistence
    Singleton data-access object that manages all SQLite database operations for the Mizan budget application.
    DatabaseHelper() - Constructor for class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Private constructor — opens the SQLite connection and creates tables.
    dbHelper - Variable in class control.AlertManager
    Persistence helper used to read and update cycle status.
    dbHelper - Variable in class control.AuthManager
    Backing store used to persist and retrieve the hashed PIN.
    dbHelper - Variable in class control.CycleManager
    Persistence helper used for all cycle database operations.
    dbHelper - Variable in class control.ExpenseManager
    Persistence helper for all database operations.
    dbHelper - Variable in class control.LimitCalculator
    Persistence helper used to fetch spending totals and cycle data.
    DefaultDarkRenderer - Class in util
    Default table cell renderer for text columns in the dark-themed expense table.
    DefaultDarkRenderer() - Constructor for class util.DefaultDarkRenderer
    Constructs a DefaultDarkRenderer with default settings.
    deleteButton - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Button to delete the selected expense row.
    deleteCategory(int) - Method in class app.App
    Permanently deletes a category from the database.
    deleteCategory(int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Permanently deletes a category from the database.
    deleteCategory(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Permanently deletes a category record from the database.
    deleteCycle(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Permanently deletes a budget cycle and its row from the database.
    deleteExpense(int) - Method in class app.App
    Permanently deletes an expense record.
    deleteExpense(int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Permanently deletes an expense record from the database.
    deleteExpense(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Permanently deletes an expense record from the database.
    domain - package domain
